title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Unknown person #7, Dadan, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Unknown person #7, Dadan, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: But we shared that drink with SABO...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Check it out...the ship is gigantic, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey... somebody treat these wounds, quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: How are we doing for provisions?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The days and months go by...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo!! You're always too soft on luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo was a nice older brother...

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Unknown person #7, Dadan, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: rising conflict.
